welcomeSub: Your autonomous dev companion. Let's set things up.
detectSub: Nakiros will install its agents in the detected editors.
updateUpToDate: Agents and workflows are up to date.
doneSub: Create your first workspace to get started.
workspaceGettingStartedDescription: Your workspace now exists in Nakiros Cloud and is cached locally for offline reads. The next onboarding stage will guide the team through context generation, project confidence, and ticket challenge.
workspaceGettingStartedStepContextDescri: Analyze the selected repositories and produce the reference docs your agents will rely on.
workspaceGettingStartedStepConfidenceDes: Measure what the system understands about the codebase and surface any remaining blind spots.
workspaceGettingStartedStepTicketsDescri: Review the current delivery scope before development starts so the workspace is operational end to end.
